note: Mathlib/Analysis/Complex/Hadamard.lean:458-463 formalizes the Hadamard three-LINE theorem (log-convexity of sup‖f‖ on vertical strips re z in [0,1]), the strip analog of the three-CIRCLE theorem (log-convexity of max‖f‖ on concentric circles in an annulus); same underlying technique/name but a distinct classical statement (strip vs. annulus, no direct decl for circles) -- not exact.
